prestazioni: Engine swap to a 1.6L Twin Spark (AR01610) with a forged crankshaft from JE Pistons (87.5mm stroke, 84mm bore) and Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, paired with a custom billet aluminum cylinder head by Autotecnica Motori featuring oversized 43mm intake valves and 37mm sodium-filled exhaust valves, ported to match a custom intake manifold with individual throttle bodies (ITBs) from Jenvey Dynamics (45mm diameter).

Forced induction via a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.63 A/R turbine housing) with a custom water-cooled center cartridge, mated to a custom stainless steel exhaust manifold by Ragazzon Racing, featuring equal-length 1.75" primaries and a 3" downpipe with a Tial 44mm external wastegate. Intercooling via a custom air-to-water setup with a PWR heat exchanger and Bosch 044 fuel pump feeding ID1000x injectors, controlled by a standalone Motec M150 ECU with flex-fuel capability.

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (DFV damping, 22-way adjustable) paired with custom polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (part #SPF1037K) for the front control arms and spherical bearings for the rear trailing arms. Braking system upgraded to Alcon 4-piston calipers (330mm front rotors, 2-piece floating design) with Ferodo DS2500 pads, paired with a Wilwood master cylinder and braided stainless steel lines. Limited-slip differential from Quaife (ATB helical LSD) with a 3.9:1 final drive ratio.
estetica: Full carbon fiber body conversion using a custom-made kit by Zender (1970s "Coda Tronca" rear end replica), including a functional rear ducktail spoiler with integrated third brake light and front lip splitter with NACA ducts for brake cooling. Side skirts replaced with custom aluminum panels by Zagato (hand-beaten, riveted construction) to match the original 1960s design language.

Interior retrimmed in full Alcantara (Rosso Alfa shade) by Recaro with custom bucket seats (Recaro SRD-E, FIA-approved) featuring 4-point harnesses from Schroth. Dashboard and door cards reupholstered in hand-stitched Italian leather by Saddleback Leather, with a custom aluminum gauge pod housing a Motec C127 dash and a Momo Prototipo steering wheel (380mm diameter, suede grip).

Wheel setup with custom 15x8" ET20 magnesium wheels by Campagnolo (original 1960s design, re-engineered with modern TUV certification) wrapped in Pirelli P7 Corsa Classic tires (205/50R15). Exterior lighting upgraded to Hella Rallye 7000 headlights (H4 bulbs, 100W) with custom Cibie Oscar LED fog lights integrated into the front bumper, and a custom LED taillight setup by United Pacific (sequential turn signals, smoked lenses).
